events.title: Code Olympics
events.description: Our flagship team coding competition: challenges, prizes and a full day of building with friends.

events.title: Do You Have the GUTS?
events.description: A high-energy hackathon for every experience level. Bring an idea—or find one and a team on the day.

events.title: The GUTS Ball
events.description: Dress up, switch off the laptop and celebrate the year with the whole community.

events.title: GUTS × SoCS Pub Quiz
events.description: Questionable team names, actually good questions and a properly relaxed night at the QMU.

events.title: Mic Drop.exe
events.description: Fast, friendly lightning talks from students and people working across tech.

events.title: Games Night
events.description: Board games, videogames and an easy way to meet the society.
